workflow.name: Axon - Destilador de Redes
workflow.description: v14: Usa Supabase Edge Function como proxy para transcripcion. Elimina problemas de multipart/binary en n8n. Solo JSON.

triggerInfo:
This workflow has the following trigger(s):


Webhook trigger(s):


				<trigger 1>
					 - Node name: Webhook
					 - Base URL: https://n8n-tuzb.srv1017783.hstgr.cloud/
					 - Production path: /webhook/distill-media
					 - Test path: /webhook-test/distill-media
					 - HTTP Method: POST
					 - Response Mode: Webhook is configured to respond using "Respond to Webhook" node.
					 - No credentials required for this webhook.
				</trigger 1>
